title: ProgMachina
author: Berghout, Tarek
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: this package introduces a ProgMachina; a full package designed specifically to deal with such run-to- failure data features passing via different important steps. Each of these steps are meant to be used for the reason of uncovering and extraction degradation patterns from row data of entire life cycles. The package also allows to release an exponentially deteriorating health index for the intended life cycle. the introductory paper of this experiment is submitted for presentation at the 10th International Electronic Conference on Sensors and Applications (link: https://ecsa-10.sciforum.net/ ). After that, these codes will be automatically switched to free open access mode for downloading. The paper and citation also will also be available under the open access policy. Please provide a full citation of our work for both zenodo files and conference paper.
